calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Reef fishtank showcase -- reef zone viz + shelter mode episode log
items.note: Generates reef-aware _episode_log.json for fishtank_viz.html: reef_cells per episode, in_reef per step, shelter mode, reef_entry/exit transitions. ARM_1_reef_food config from EXQ-522 (hazard_food_attraction=0.7).

items.title: SD-049 Phase 2 reef-environment behavioural validation (monostrategy fix for 514b)
items.note: 514b C2b FAIL (probe_acc_neighborhood=0.483 < 0.6): monostrategy in 8x8/0-hazard env gave weak contrastive z_resource signal. Reef (EXQ-522 PASS, 2 behavioral attractors, zone_transitions=48.9) provides per-type neighborhood diversity needed for identity encoder training.

items.title: SD-049 BG gating diagnostic -- does running_variance ever drop below commit_threshold?
items.note: Diagnostic motivated by 514b C2b FAIL: user concern that beta gate (MECH-090) may never commit with default 514b config (no bistable, no dACC, no urgency_weight), so agent does fixed initial behaviour then idles. Tracks rv_final + committed_frac_last_third per seed per episode. Smoke test confirms: rv_final=0.5000 all 3 seeds, never committed. Full run will show whether 90-episode training ever closes the variance gap.

items.title: MECH-302 relief-completion discriminative pair -- longer episodes (300 steps)
items.note: 517a root cause: steps_per_episode=150 geometrically too short for heal_rate=0.002/step (max 0.3 total healing, comparator window=30 needs sustained drop to 0.005). Mean events=0.33/seed structurally insufficient. Fix: steps_per_episode 150->300. heal_rate and comparator thresholds unchanged (conservative fix preserving scientific validity).

items.title: SD-049 BG gating seaweed diagnostic -- schema predictability + BG gate commitment
items.note: 514d smoke confirmed rv_final=0.5000 all 3 seeds, gate never commits under random resource placement. ARM_A=random (no landmarks, world_obs_dim=325), ARM_B=seaweed (n_landmarks_b=2, landmark_b_resource_bias=1.0, world_obs_dim=375). PASS: committed_frac_last_third_b > 0.05 AND rv_final_b < 0.40 AND > arm_a + 0.02. If PASS: E1-learnable spatial schema enables BG gate commitment; MECH-216 (E1 schema readout) is the architectural lever. Dry-run PASS 2026-05-05: all 6 arm-seed combos completed cleanly, world_obs_dims correct.

items.title: SD-032b dACC reef -- dacc_bias_max_abs=2.0 architectural fix
items.note: 445f FAIL: action_class_entropy=0.0 in all seeds -- monostrategy survived reef env. Root cause: DACCAdaptiveControl.forward() clips score_bias to dacc_bias_max_abs (default 1.0) but E3 scores are O(17): bias saturated at max_abs=1.0 well below score range. Fix: DACCConfig.dacc_bias_max_abs raised to 2.0 in ree_core/cingulate/dacc.py. Smoke PASS: bias=2.00 confirmed. 2 conditions x 3 seeds x 280 eps at 150 steps/ep on 14x14 grid with reef.

items.title: SD-029 reef comparator with graduation gate + degraded measurement policy
items.note: 523 undertrained (n_train_steps=2000 fixed, r2=0.57) and hardcoded evidence_direction='supports'. Fix: (1) adaptive graduation gate (rolling r2>=0.85 for 5 consecutive windows of 200 steps, max 8000 steps); (2) epsilon=0.4 exploration + aggressive external injection (interval=5, prob=1.0) to break monostrategy and generate balanced self-vs-ext events; (3) INCONCLUSIVE_UNDERTRAINED outcome when graduation fails; (4) per-claim evidence_direction_per_claim for SD-029 and MECH-256 independently.

items.title: SD-003 harm attribution anchor -- corrected format superseding EXQ-205 (post-SD-011 substrate)
items.note: EXQ-205 (April 2 PASS) had outcome:None (old format field). SD-019/020/021 landed April 10 after that run. Fresh run with current harm stream + correct output schema.

items.title: Q-034 reef-enabled threshold sweep -- monostrategy fix for EXQ-451
items.note: EXQ-451 FAIL on C1/C2: monostrategy (action_entropy=0.0) prevented dose-response. Fix: reef substrate (reef_enabled=True, n_reef_patches=3, reef_patch_radius=2, hazard_food_attraction=0.7) creates two behavioral attractors (flee-to-reef vs forage). Grid 8x8->10x10. Also fixes: ISO timestamp in run_id, verdict PASS/FAIL based on actual outcome, global ep counter across warmup+eval phases.

items.title: MECH-112 goal-directed behavior -- identity encoder + reef (fresh angle over EXQ-189)
items.note: Fresh MECH-112 test with reef (SD-050) + SD-049 Phase 2 identity encoder. GOAL_PRESENT: identity_classifier trained on food/water types, z_goal seeded from z_resource. GOAL_ABSENT: no goal system, same env. 10x10 grid, 3 hazards, 8 resources (4 food + 4 water), reef_enabled=True. Phased: P0=100 warmup, P1=150 freeze+train, eval=50. world_obs_dim=325.
